name: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU PW48V-12V150W
title: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU PW48V-12V150W
description: MikroTik PW48V-12V150W Hot Swap PSU is a high-performance 48 V DC telecom power supply designed for reliable operation in demanding network environments. It is compatible with MikroTik devices such as CCR1072, CCR2216, CRS518, and CRS520, making it a perfect choice for professional installations that require continuous uptime. This hot-swappable module allows you to replace or install the power supply without turning off the device, ensuring uninterrupted network operation. It supports an input voltage range from –36 V to –57 V, providing flexibility for various telecom setups. Built for efficiency and stability, the PW48V-12V150W delivers consistent 12 V output power up to 150 W, meeting the needs of high-performance routers and switches. Its durable and compact design ensures long-term reliability while maintaining easy maintenance and quick replacement. Whether used as a main or backup unit, the MikroTik PW48V-12V150W offers dependable power and seamless integration for critical network infrastructure.
